variants.label: recommended
variants.text: We gave sixty builders a three-day window and one rule: every demo ships as a link anyone can open. By Sunday the room was full of things you could click.

variants.label: variant-a
variants.text: Three days. Sixty builders. One rule: ship a demo anyone can open. The constraint did all the real work here.

variants.label: variant-b
variants.text: Our beta had a deadline and a public-output rule. Sixty builders met both, and every demo is a link you can open right now.

notes: Recorded writer output for the fixture run. Three distinct angles on the same verified anchor (the three-day window, the openable-demo rule, the count). No em dash, no inflation, no financial register, no placeholder, no banned pattern — passes the live deterministic pre-gate.
